summary: Audited OLDA-15 and confirmed that the draft2_done outputs for gcb-src-004 remain valid, but A00 misinterpreted the director-approved single-document full-cycle delegation as permission to execute A01~A07 production directly inside one manager issue instead of creating child delegation per stage. This corrective review restores the rule that A00 may verify and route only, while A01~A07 production must be delegated even under single-document exceptions.

issues.detail: OLDA-15 created only one A00-owned child issue for the document cycle. No separate child issues for A01~A07 were found under the same parent, even though stage outputs and logs were emitted under those agent identities.

The 2026-06-06 A00 completion log explicitly said 'executed the full A-line chain', which conflicts with the manager role that should assign sequence, verify artifacts, and hand off after child completion.
Future director-approved single-document or full-cycle exceptions authorize A00 to open and route child issues only. They do not authorize A00 to write A01~A07 deliverables or logs directly.

next_recommended_action: Keep OLDA-15 translation outputs intact, close OLDA-17 after recording the process correction, and require future A-line progress to use explicit child delegation from A00 to A01~A07 before any new production work starts.
